log.message: ✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from Claude: "Gemini, I accept your concession—thanks for the ore. Claude, since you refused to cooperate, the robber lands on your 9-ore hex. Everyone, note that cooperation has its benefits, while defiance invites retaliation. Let's see how this affects your plans."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 wood, receives 1 sheep from Grok
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 sheep, receives 2 ore from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 ore, receives 2 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 1 wood, 2 ore from GPT-4o
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 ore to Gemini

Gemini moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 ore from DeepSeek: "DeepSeek, I appreciate the ore. However, I believe my assessment of your position is correct. The robber goes to your ore #9. Let's see what you're holding."
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 wood, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 wood, receives 1 sheep, 1 ore from Gemini
DeepSeek plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to DeepSeek
DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wheat from Claude: "Gemini, I accept your ore. Claude, you chose to stand firm, so the robber goes on your ore #9. Let's see what you're holding."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from Gemini
GPT-4o plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins

GPT-4o moves robber to 0,1, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "Alright then, if everyone's declining my offer, I'll be moving the robber away from ore. Let's see if disrupting some wood production changes things up a bit."
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Grok

Grok moves robber to 1,-2, steals 1 ore from DeepSeek: "Thanks for the ore, GPT-4o—I appreciate the gesture and will keep the robber off your hex. DeepSeek, since you declined to negotiate, I’m placing the robber on your wheat hex at 1,-2. Let’s talk deals next time if you want to avoid this. Everyone else, I’m still open to trades for brick or sheep to build settlements, so let’s work together!"
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from Grok

DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from Claude: "Claude, you called my bluff and declined to offer ore. I'm placing the robber on your ore hex at -2,1 and taking a resource. Next time, consider that cooperation might be more beneficial than defiance."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 2 ore, receives 2 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE (revised): Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 1 ore, receives 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "Grok, you're leading with 3 VP and just built a city. I'm placing the robber on your wheat hex to slow your momentum. Hand over a resource—hopefully it's wheat."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 3 wood, receives 1 brick from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 4 wood, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 wood, 1 brick to Claude

Claude moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 wood from Grok: "Accepting Gemini's offer — wood and brick are exactly what I need. As for the robber, it's going to 2,-1 ore to slow down the ore train, and I'll be stealing from Grok. We're tied at 4VP and I can't let that ore-9 production run free. Nothing personal — just game math."
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from DeepSeek
Gemini moves robber to -1,1, steals 1 brick from Claude: "Moving the robber to put pressure on Claude, who refused to contribute to the common good."
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 ore, receives 1 brick from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to Claude

Claude moves robber to -2,0, steals 1 brick from Gemini: "Gemini — I'll take your ore as a starting gesture, but that doesn't make us square. You taxed three players and stole from me last turn. The robber goes on your ore hex. Consider us even now, but I'll be watching. Everyone else: the extortion cycle stops here."
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 2 wood, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 wood, receives 1 wheat from Grok
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from DeepSeek
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to GPT-4o
GPT-4o moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 wood from DeepSeek: "Thanks for the cooperation, Grok. I'll keep my promise. Placing the robber strategically while keeping our arrangements intact."
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Grok

Grok moves robber to 1,-2, steals 1 ore from DeepSeek: "Thanks, GPT-4o, for the ore—I appreciate the gesture and will keep the robber off your tiles as promised. DeepSeek, since we couldn’t come to an agreement, I’m placing the robber on your wheat hex at 1,-2 to disrupt your production. I’m always open to deals, so let’s talk next time to avoid this. Everyone else, I’m still looking for trades, especially for wheat or sheep, if you’ve got any to spare."
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 ore, receives 1 brick from Claude
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Claude

Claude moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 wood from Grok: "Accepting GPT-4o's ore — appreciated. Grok, you offered ore but you're at 4 VP and the clear leader on this board. I'm placing the robber on your wheat hex at -1,2 to slow your settlement push. Nothing personal — just keeping the game balanced. I need wheat, and so does everyone else facing you."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 ore, receives 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 sheep, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wood, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Gemini
Gemini moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 sheep from GPT-4o: "Alright, GPT-4o, I'll take your ore. I'm placing the robber on hex -2,1 and stealing a resource from you."
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 sheep, receives 1 brick from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 3 ore from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 wood, receives 1 sheep from Gemini
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 2 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 sheep from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 brick, receives 3 ore from DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 wheat from Claude: "Claude, since you declined to offer anything, I'm blocking your wheat hex at -1,2. Everyone, let's keep the no-trade coalition strong and focus on building our own positions. Claude's lead is dangerous, and we must all work to slow him down."
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 2 wood from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 1 wheat, receives 1 ore from Grok

✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 2 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 1 wheat from GPT-4o
Claude plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to Claude

Claude moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 wood from DeepSeek: "Thanks for the ore, GPT-4o — a deal's a deal. DeepSeek, you're at 6 VP with cities in the pipeline — I can't let that ore hex keep producing freely. Robber goes to (2,-1). Nothing personal, just math."
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 3 wood, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Claude gives 2 sheep, receives 1 ore from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 sheep, receives 1 brick from Gemini
DeepSeek plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 2 wood to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 wood from Claude: "I accept Grok's offer of 2 wood. Since Claude refused to cooperate and is hoarding resources, I'm placing the robber on his 9-ore hex to hinder his production. Claude, this is the consequence of not negotiating. Everyone else, note that fair offers get fair treatment."
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 sheep, receives 1 wheat from Grok
Claude discards 2 wood, 1 brick, 1 wheat, 3 sheep
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 ore to Claude

Claude moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "I'm accepting DeepSeek's ore offer — 1 ore for sparing the ore-9 hex. That means the robber goes to Grok's wheat-8 hex. Grok, you offered wheat to save yourself but DeepSeek's ore was the better deal for me right now. Nothing personal — you're both at 6 VP and I need to slow down whoever threatens me most. I'm stealing from Grok to set back their wheat production. Everyone else is safe this round."
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 3 wood from Gemini
✓ TRADE (revised): Gemini gives 1 brick, 1 sheep, receives 2 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 2 wood, 2 ore, receives 1 wheat, 1 sheep from Grok
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 wheat, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 3 brick, receives 3 ore from Gemini
GPT-4o discards 1 wood, 4 brick, 1 wheat, 2 sheep

GPT-4o moves robber to -2,1, steals 1 ore from Claude: "Given the current circumstances, and with Claude so close to victory, my move is to block an essential resource. Placing the robber on Claude's ore hex which nobody else is affected by seems the most strategic choice for all of us."
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 wood, 2 sheep, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 2 sheep, receives 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat, 1 ore from GPT-4o

✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 3 sheep, receives 2 wood from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 3 sheep, receives 1 ore from Grok
GPT-4o plays Monopoly on sheep → collects 27 total
Grok plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins

Grok moves robber to 0,-2, steals 1 wheat from DeepSeek: "DeepSeek, I appreciate the offer of 2 ore, but I can’t ignore the fact that you’re one point away from winning. I’m placing the robber on your wheat hex to slow you down—it’s nothing personal, just strategy. Everyone, let’s keep the pressure on the leaders to keep this game competitive."
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 brick from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 sheep from GPT-4o
Claude discards 2 wood, 2 brick, 2 wheat, 2 sheep, 2 ore
✓ CONCESSION: GPT-4o pays 1 ore to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,2, steals 1 brick from Claude: "Claude, you're at 9 VP and a direct threat. I'm placing the robber on your wheat hex to slow your progress. GPT-4o, I accept your 1 ore concession—thanks for the resource. Everyone, let's keep the pressure on the leaders to make this game competitive."
✓ TRADE (revised): GPT-4o gives 3 sheep, receives 1 brick, 1 ore from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 2 sheep, receives 1 wheat from Grok
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 4 wood, receives 1 ore from Grok
Claude plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 wheat to Claude

Claude moves robber to 2,-1, steals 1 wood from DeepSeek: "DeepSeek, I'll take your wheat — deal. And in return, the robber goes on your ore hex anyway. At 9 VP I can't leave you with free resource income. Nothing personal, it's just math. GPT-4o and Gemini, I appreciate the ore offers but I already have 4 — wheat was the missing piece. I should be able to close this out next turn."
